bias.analyst: Order-flow update: the resting book brackets the open - the lower shelf that survived yesterday'[level]-hour attack has been rebuilt even bigger, while a heavy supply ceiling is stacked a few points overhead. Between them the book is thin. Expect price to be pulled toward one magnet or the other after the bell; the plan is unchanged - let the first half hour pick the direction, then trade with it, targeting the front of the far wall, never through it.
bias.commentator: Team news from the tunnel: yesterday's heroic back line has been REINFORCED overnight - the defense is bigger than ever. But the away side has parked three buses a few points overhead. Wide open midfield in between! Kickoff in fifteen - whoever wins the first half hour gets a clear run at the opposing wall. Theo's orders: ride the winning side, shoot BEFORE the wall, never into the keeper's gloves.

events.analyst: Theo Live is now public. From here on, session events appear in this feed with a delay - wins, losses, and the days we sit on our hands.
events.commentator: Welcome to the grounds! The gates are open for the first time. Pre-season record is on the board - including the losses. We hide nothing here, folks.
